author: Mihir Srivastava
name: Linearized Neural Memory + TTT
blurb: Titans-style linearized neural memory (causal linear attention via cumsum, zero loops) in each block, combined with LoRA TTT eval, overtone init, phase-transition resid_mix, Muon WD, AdamW, FP16 embedding bypass, int6 mixed precision, and 10 layers.
